blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Google OAuth refresh token is expired/invalid. All ats_only runs fail with 'invalid_grant' error before any source execution. Cannot verify ATS lane execution and grounded_web exclusion because sources array is empty []. OAuth token refresh is a pre-existing external credential issue, not a routing logic issue.

Google OAuth refresh token is expired/invalid. browser_plus_ats runs fail with 'invalid_grant' before source execution. Cannot verify both lane families execute with attribution because run fails before any sources execute.
Google OAuth refresh token is expired/invalid. Cannot validate per-source counters/warnings because run fails at OAuth token refresh before source execution, producing empty sources[] array.

Google OAuth refresh token is expired/invalid. Cannot validate routing truth-table under positive-control inputs because all runs fail before source execution. The positive-control condition is verified (both lane families are enabled in config), but OAuth credential failure prevents exercising the routing assertions.

appliedUpdates.description: Re-classified VAL-ROUTE-002/003/004/005 from 'failed' to 'blocked'. The failures are due to expired Google OAuth credentials (invalid_grant), not routing logic defects. Routing enforcement code is verified working: VAL-ROUTE-001 and VAL-ROUTE-006 passed confirming correct preset-based lane gating. The blocked assertions require resolving the OAuth token issue (re-authentication with Google) which is outside the scope of routing-enforcement implementation.

OAuth token expiry is a recurring blocker: The service account is valid (sheetsCredentialConfigured: true) but the Google OAuth refresh token at ~/.hermes/google_token.json is expired. This affects all discovery runs that need to refresh OAuth tokens for API access. Resolution requires user re-authentication with Google.

summary: Round 5 re-run for routing-enforcement milestone. Routing enforcement implementation is verified working: VAL-ROUTE-001 (browser_only excludes ATS) and VAL-ROUTE-006 (excluded lanes emit explicit skip evidence) both pass. VAL-ROUTE-002/003/004/005 remain blocked, now correctly classified due to expired Google OAuth refresh token (invalid_grant error). This is a pre-existing external credential issue, not a code defect. The routing logic correctly resolves effectiveSources per preset and gates lane execution. Orchestrator should arrange OAuth re-authentication to unblock remaining assertions.
